articles.title: Luka Doncic injury update: Latest on Lakers star ahead of Game 2 vs Thunder
articles.description: Luka Doncic’s recovery from a Grade 2 hamstring strain continues to cloud the Lakers’ playoff hopes ahead of Game 2 against the Thunder. After undergoing PRP treatments in Spain, Doncic admitted there is still no firm return timeline, while medical criticism surrounding the treatment has intensified concern. With the Lakers trailing 1-0 and dealing with more injuries in the rotation, LeBron James and the rest of the roster face mounting pressure to keep the series alive without their superstar guard.

articles.title: 4 Zodiac Signs Facing A Turning Point On 9th May 2026 - Are You The One?
articles.description: The horoscope tomorrow points to a day of steady but meaningful progress for four zodiac signs. Tomorrow’s horoscope highlights a practical cosmic mood where clarity, patience, and emotional maturity can create real momentum. The horoscope for tomorrow suggests that for these four signs, career choices, relationship conversations, and personal discipline could shape what comes next. This daily horoscope tomorrow is less about dramatic change and more about decisions that quietly define your next chapter.

articles.title: Best of Both Sides | Sindoor 2.0 must go beyond deterrence
articles.description: Sindoor 2.0 should be designed not merely to punish but to extract concrete concessions. In return for the captured territory, India should insist on the repatriation and prosecution of terrorist leaders, dismantling of terror networks and public renunciation of state sponsorship for terrorism.

articles.title: ‘Entirely Inconsistent’: Trump Vs Pope Leo XIV Takes NEW Turn As Florida Bishop Steps Into Clash
articles.description: President Donald Trump is facing backlash from an unexpected place, his own Florida backyard. A Palm Beach bishop publicly defended Pope Leo XIV after Trump accused the pontiff of “endangering Catholics” over Iran comments. The clash comes as Secretary of State Marco Rubio meets Pope Leo at the Vatican amid growing tensions between Trump allies and the Catholic Church. The explosive Pope Leo vs Trump feud is now drawing reactions from religious leaders, political insiders, and critics online.#trump #popeleoxiv #pope #donaldtrump #florida #palmbeach #catholica #marcorubio #vatican #thevatican #trumpnews #vaticannews #popenews #italy

articles.title: Karnataka: HC extends stay on FIR against MLA, election officials till June 3
articles.description: The Bengaluru High Court has extended a stay on an FIR concerning the Sringeri vote recount. The case involves BJP MLA DN Jeevaraj and election officials KN Ramesh and Vedamurthy. The FIR was filed following a complaint about alleged electoral malpractice. The court's decision provides temporary relief to the accused. The Congress party plans to challenge the revised election results.
